breakdown: This PR refactors rewards box handling to use a centralized robust numeric conversion approach with fallback chains. It adds a `_get_raw` helper that intelligently handles empty strings, zero values, NaN/inf before passing to `_DNC.convert_value`. The new test file covers both unit and E2E scenarios. Minor concerns: the `_get_raw` helper uses `Any` type; some assertions in E2E test are minimal; helper function lacks docstring.
key_changes: Added `_get_raw` helper function with robust fallback logic for numeric extraction
Replaced multiple `coerce_int` calls with centralized `_DNC.convert_value` approach
Added logic to handle NaN/inf as invalid (keep searching for fallback)
Added test file `testing_mcp/test_rewards_box_robustness.py` with unit and E2E tests
Added comment explaining WHY boolean representations are handled differently for LLM payloads
